Edit 9/6/2025 (Not Recommended): Patch 3 ruined the fun of the game.

More bugs were brought into the game in place of patching out golden boost.

-Characters rubberband when going for volleys.
-Connecting to games takes longer.
-Sometimes, while connecting to games, you disconnect back to the lobby with no notice or error.
-Sometimes, when connecting to in-progress games, your camera is stuck on one angle and you can't move.

Movement in the game now feels ass.

-Push dribbling now pushes the ball further, which is ruining the whole attacking flow from before.
-When doing running push dribbles, there is a movement stagger that REALLY slows you down, which allows your defender to catch up even when you're ahead, or another defender enough time to cut in.
-Extra efforting even when starting it ahead of the enemy feels like it makes no space, as running with the ball definitely feels slower.

This is all because they decided they wanted to nerf golden boost, a tech that used your most important resource and was still counterable, instead of nerfing the baby ass defense mechanism in this game.

I loved this game before the patch, but now it feels irritating to even take the ball.

Edit 9/26/2025 [Recommended (Barely)]: Season 1 got rid of most of the problems I had with patch 3, actually feels playable now. :)

Edit 11/3/2025 (Not Recommended): ♥♥♥♥ this inconsistent game.

room to grow which is exciting. awesome we're actually getting a skill based soccer game that encourages cool plays and not spam.

[h2]Style meets skill[/h2]

One of the best football games where individual skill matters and not anything else related to stats, your playstyle will determine the outcome in or out the pitch. The third-person perspective challenges your spatial awareness to act upon the specific situation you're in while keeping in touch with your teammates' positions. While dribbling is encouraged, you need to rely on being a teamplayer and not overly indulge in selfish endeavors; you'll have your moment if patience is your virtue.

REMATCH is one unique approach to a fresh experience for dedicated fans but not only, any sports enthusiast might delve deep into this journey. Remember that the practice is required to seek more skillful advantages to yourself, create and evolve your own set of masteries. I've had a massive déjà vu but couldn't quite pinpoint it out.. it was freaking Galactik Football, a total banger football show from our distant childhoods, while it's still not here in real life we can experience a glimpse of that in this game. Go ahead and REMATCH!

[h1] Rematch- игра про футбол, которая может понравится даже не фанатам футбола. [/h1]

Достоинства игры:
-Качественный и стильный дизайн
-Проработанный геймплей
-Сочный звук

Существующие проблемы:
-Технические неполадки: частые рассинхроны между игроками
-Проблемы с серверами: регулярные вылеты в самый неподходящий момент

По итогу: Игра из разряда «Easy to learn, hard to master», играть весело, есть огромный потенциал, но пока всё омрачают проблемы с технической составляющей. На данный момент сложно воспринимать её как полноценную соревновательную игру, т.к. в самый ответственный момент она может просто крашнутся и все старания летят в помойку.
Если вы готовы мириться с лагами/вылетами и хотите попробовать динамичный футбольный экшен - можно смело покупать. В противном случае стоит дождаться обновлений и фиксов.

el mejor juego que he jugado en mi vida. pero en la beta, ahora ha bajado de jugadores, no han quitado bugs, no meten contenido llamativo, mataron el juego de una forma increible, vendanse a epic games o algo asi que como empresa ellos si reviven este juego y lo hacen top.

EDIT: Cada actualización en vez de mejorar está empeorando el juego, prácticamente está injugable hoy en día.
EDIT 2: El juego mejoró muchisimo y creo que lo seguirá haciendo, el estudio parece que quieren redimirse de todos los errores que tuvieron y lo estan recompensando. 

CONTRAS: 
Muchos MUCHOS bugs, no solo dentro de la cancha sino que también en el battle pass y en la personalización del personaje. 
Alto ping, lo cual hace que por momentos sea injugable.
Faltan mas comandos y opciones para la jugabilidad (mas regates, tipos de disparo, atajadas). 


PROS: 
El juego cuando no aparecen bugs, el ping es estable y a pesar de algunas carencias es muy disfrutable y se puede apreciar mucho su potencial.
Las partidas son rápidas y dinámicas, lo cual lo vuelve bastante adictivo, ya sea que hayas ganado o perdido siempre vas a querer jugar otra.
Jugar solo esta muy bien a pesar de los que no la pasan, se desconectan, se hacen goles en contra, o no quieren ir de arquero, ya que estos suelen ser la gran minoría, la mayoría le pone buena onda y juegan en equipo para ganar. Obviamente con amigos la experiencia mejora muchísimo más.

CONCLUSIÓN:
Tendrían que haberlo desarrollado mas antes de lanzarlo pero se nota el potencial que tiene el juego, creo que el estudio se merece una oportunidad, dándole nuestro apoyo para que siga creciendo y así poder mejorar el juego. 

PD: En lo personal hacia años que no jugaba ningún juego de futbol, (soy mas de la vieja escuela, del Winning Eleven y el PES, el ultimo que había jugado fué el PES 18 creo) y llevo años esperando que salga un juego con estas características mas al estilo Fifa Street y estoy contento de que la espera llegó a su fin.

edit: eu escrevi uma analise no lançamento dizendo que o potencial do jogo é infinito e poderia ser um jogo iconico da comunidade gamer, mas alertei que talvez não estávamos vendo o iceberg por completo.

O jogo da beta para o lançamento teve praticamente 0 mudanças, o que já indicava o descaso dos desenvolvedores em melhorar... ignoramos isso.

É um jogo feito pra ganhar dinheiro, que pode até ter conseguido no inicio, mas hoje conta com pouquíssimos jogadores e uma empresa arrependida de não ter investido mais nele e nos players que sempre são a alma do negócio.

Parabéns pra Sloclap por estragarem o jogo e a própria imagem da empresa para lançamentos futuros, certamente levaremos em consideração o que este jogo se tornou quando lançarem outros games por assinatura.

玩了两次测试，加这次提前游戏，确实踢很上头，希望游戏越来越好。一般踢足球不爱守门的可能不想守门，相信我，这游戏哪个位置你都能发现乐趣包括守门员，位置也是轮换的。游戏有点像CS，内容相对纯粹没有数值，只看技术和配合，第三人称视角，适合爱玩射击竞技类游戏或者喜欢足球的玩家。
希望亚服人能多起来（挂别多就行）
有一些BUG希望陆续调整：
1.希望架设港服。
2.开球时球会到其他人手里（截至目前未修复）

不同于eafc和实况，创造了一种新的足球游戏的操作方式，甚至于某些层面上我个人认为这是一款更贴近于真实足球操作逻辑的游戏，不是将手柄的四个按键简单的归结成传球直塞射门，而是趟球，击球的概念。过人不是靠五星花式动作，而是趟跑结合，这里的操作对应的是动作而不是传球、射门之类的概念，例如在教程里x键看似是用来传球的 但其实也可以用来射门，而r2射门键看似是射门但其实也可以是大力传球。很高兴看到足球游戏能有这种创新。当然这套操作逻辑还有待优化，我也很不习惯右摇杆又要看着球又要瞄着门（可能只是简单因为我菜或者是还没吃透操作逻辑）

Tons of fun and very addicting. And that's coming from someone who doesn't care about soccer very much. Turns out removing penalties, offside, and the touch line was all I really needed.

(Note that I have also put an additional, uncounted ~20 hours into the betas held before launch)
The gameplay on offer here is impeccable, presenting me with an experience closer to the excitement I feel when playing soccer IRL than I've ever gotten through a videogame. Rocket League used to fill this niche since it was unique in that team play and positioning while controlling a singular character in a 3d, fast pased arena with plenty of room for individual skill was the focus and well implemented, but Rematch offers all of those in a package much closer to actual soccer. I don't want to go back to Rocket league for now, this game is great.

While I am confident the devs will improve the networking mishaps that still occur in-game, and improve/iterate on the balancing of the various 1-on-1 interactions that can occur, I am very worried that the stingy/bare cosmetics will push away those accustomed to other pay to play games that regularly reward the player with many varied cosmetics just for playing. It is worth noting that the clothing cosmetics you do get here are more versatile than those in some other games, but I am also concerned the community won't see it that way (especially with how few are available and attainable right now).

Overall though, I really do love the gameplay to bits and I truly hope this game thrives.

UPDATE: After playing full release a bit more, you do get plenty of currency to buy cosmetics. I have removed the section about that. However, there still isn't much variety yet and I hope they don't have FOMO game passes.

I will update this review as I go. - I am actively playing at time of writing and I am having fun. 

Why not recommend ?

The goalkeeper ball desync.

But I am still hooked, I am having a lot of fun! But iknow my teammates or randoms that i play with will just not bother with that making it a short evening or losing people, that is the main reason for the bad review.

Game is honestly great and lots of fun (especially with friends) but plagued with bugs. Until this is ironed out, the review will be negative. One that just got fixed was the team who just scored end up with the ball at kick off. Fair enough, glad that got sorted but now, new bugs have been introduced. 

One I've just experienced is that the ball just phases through my player. Where it would normally lock to your feet when you receive the ball, now it rolls straight through my feet. Ridiculous really. This lasted for the entire match, made me look completely useless but there was NOTHING I could do. It's as if my player was on a different layer. Zero collision with opposition, zero collision with the ball. Not only that, but I would receive a penalty if I leave that match. Feel like it's more of a penalty to my team mates who have to play a man down. 

It is so frustrating to spend money on a game which ALSO MIGHT I ADD assured us we'd have cross platform at launch, have now gone back on their word. You guys gotta do better. The mechanics are there, visuals are great, good learning curve and difficulty ceiling, its all there, but the execution is mediocre to poor. 

It bothers me that the beta felt more stable than this full release. 

Current state - 6/10. Wait til bugs are patched.

As someone who doesn't even follow soccer (football), this game is insanely fun. The movement feels good (to me at least) and you get to do cool stuff, what can I say. Playing with a team opens up a lot of options for growth in terms of play dynamics, which feels rewarding to learn and improve on. Time will tell if this game improves how we want it to, but I do think for a casual player, this game is a great way to spend some time, especially cause matches are short, so you can fit in games throughout a busy day.

I am in agreement with a lot of the other reviews about bugs, I am simply trying to see this optimistically. The patch notes say things have been fixed, and all of those issues persist. They said they had fixed them from the last beta, they hadn't, then they said they hot fixed them and they hadn't. You could look at that and see it as developers not doing their job. To be honest, the hot fix says a lot. I think they are trying to fix them game and it's just not doing what they want. Now, this is an issue in and of itself, that they may not be sure what is causing the issues and stuff, but I do think they are trying, otherwise, why claim you are hot fixing something, then tweet about it and stuff. They are being very proactive for people that are posers, if it is as people are saying. 
I will say that since the betas, it is MUCH less laggy, which is notable. I think that people are over playing the problems to a degree. (Should there be any problems? No, but let's me honest, what game doesn't have bugs. People still play Ark and I 
mean... look at it.) I understand complaining about the crashing too, but Rivals had insane crashing on release too and people kept playing it. 
That said, I believe these issues will be fixed. It's taking longer than we want, but I think that simply comes from the developers' inexperience.

Rematch — не просто футбольный симулятор, а настоящая арена для эгоистов и командных гениев. Здесь каждый управляет одним футболистом, и успех зависит только от твоего скилла, тактики и умения работать в команде.

В Rematch нет фолов, офсайдов и пауз — только бешеный темп, быстрые атаки и решения на инстинктах. Ты словно игрок, который должен мгновенно читать игру и находить лазейки в обороне соперника. А если хочется почувствовать себя настоящим лидером — бери мяч и тащи его до ворот, не отдавая никому, ведь тут можно стать настоящим «королём поля» и показать всем свою красную ауру.

Игра напоминает смесь динамичного футбола и аркадного драйва: стена вместо аутов, никаких правил и максимум свободы для проявления индивидуальности. Но если будешь слишком эгоистичен, рискуешь проиграть — ведь в Rematch побеждают те, кто умеет сочетать личный стиль с командной игрой.

Rematch — это твой шанс пройти свой собственный путь от новичка до легенды. Готов ли ты стать тем самым нападающим, который изменит ход матча и войдёт в историю виртуального футбола?

[h2]⚽Overview [/h2]
Rematch is Sloclap’s bold entry into the world of sports games. Known for stylish action titles like Sifu, the studio takes a completely different approach here—combining the fast-paced rhythm of arcade football with tactical one-player control in tight, 5v5 match formats. Rather than simulate real-world football, Rematch re-imagines it: no offsides, no fouls, no downtime. Just speed, skill, and strategy.

[h2]✅Pros [/h2]
+Fast and Fluid Gameplay: The game thrives on momentum. Players switch positions after goals, keeping each match dynamic and unpredictable.

+Unique Visual Style: Set in a futuristic, energy-conscious world, every stadium is vibrant and distinct, making the game visually stand out from traditional sports sims.

+Emphasis on Skill: With advanced moves like trick passes and diving saves, individual performance has a major impact on the team’s success.

+Inclusive Design: Character customization embraces diversity, including options for various body types, disabilities, and cultural styles.

+Solid Performance: Runs smoothly even on modest hardware, with responsive controls and little to no bugs at launch.

[h2]❌Cons [/h2]
-Limited Game Modes at Launch: Only a few match formats are available, and offline play with AI teammates is still in development.

-Fixed Control Layout: Some players might find the lack of button remapping inconvenient.

-Learning Curve: Mastering advanced techniques takes time, which may be frustrating for casual players.

-Niche Appeal: Not a traditional football sim—those expecting realism might find it too stylized.

[h2]🏁Verdict [/h2]
Rematch is a breath of fresh air in a genre crowded with annual rehashes. It trades realism for style, speed, and fun—and that’s a good thing. While it may not satisfy hardcore sim fans, it offers something new: a skill-based, inclusive, and creative take on football that feels more like a competitive action game than a sports broadcast.

[b] Rating [/b]: ★★★★☆ (4/5)
[b] Best For [/b]: Fans of arcade sports games, action-focused gameplay, and stylish competition.

okay so honestly after some time, it has become abundantly clear that there is no interest in further developing the game, it has become just a dump for sponsored cosmetics.

Early on it's been a blast, but the basically dead player base as well as the horrible monetization really leaves me no choice but to leave a negative review.

After my League of Legends addiction, I spent a long time searching for a game that I could quickly pick up for a few matches, but that still had enough mechanical depth to really sink my teeth into.

ReMatch is that game – and I haven't had this much fun with a title in a very, very long time.

Clear goal.

It's a very fun game if you like competitive and fast paced games with a large focus on teamplay, it's easy to pick up and learn but there's depth of skill here, primarily in passing and in the actual real-life football things like spacing, understanding runs, etc.

Now with that said, the game is VERY buggy, not in a way that will prevent you from playing it, but there is a lot of ball warping, there is tremendous server lag (currently the early access has more of it than the last playtest did, be warned) and the mouse+keyboard controls definitely need some tweaking to feel right, passing accurately is more of a struggle against poor implementation than anything else.

Additionally, as with any game that relies heavily on teamplay, if you have any basic understanding of football or have the ability to think and learn at an average level then you will definitely find yourself very frustrated with the complete lack of brain activity from players as you climb through the ranks. People will crowd the ball, not look for space, not defend, try to hold onto it forever and dribble as if they're the main characters, goalies with zero nerves who flop the moment they register movement, etc.

If you believe in your skill to climb out of the lower rank hell, or plan to play with friends, then this should be little problem for you, if you plan to solo queue and make your way out of there on your own then I hope you've got some mental fortitude.

Overall I recommend the game to anyone who enjoys quick-paced competitive team games, who appreciate football or in general enjoy games that places a lot of emphasis on positional play.
If you have a hard time accepting very buggy and clearly uncooked and unpolished products, then wait until some patches are out.

It's worth pointing out that the mouse+keyboard input option is significantly worse than controller, and devs seem completely unable to create a good solution for mouse. the result is that you are very limited in your playmaking and finish capacity if you wont use controller.

Ill recommend the game but it is with a big "might not be for you" warning, especially from the bad netcode coupled with absolutely horrid mouse input implementation

Are there issues with the game? Yes. It's early access. Its fun. Some players need to learn to pass but that's not a fault of the game, that's just the players being dumb. Queue times can be a little long in the NA region, but that's a simple fix of just changing regions. I am NA East and I play on EU because I don't like the Queue times and the ping isn't terrible. It's a great game. I 100% recommend. Better than RL in my opinion.

The idea is great but the technical execution is just terrible. 
It very much feels like playing a game in alpha, the de-sync/lag is terrible, the number of bugs in the game is crazy, for example when the other team scores it should be your teams kickoff, sometimes the ball will be in the keepers hands on kick off or with an opposing teams player. 

Playing in net can sometimes be hit or miss, if you dive onto the ball often it will just slide straight past you even though on your screen and on replay you clearly make contact. 

You will often experience crashes or as I'm writing this review the servers are down for maintenance, I was midgame ranked with no warning I am just disconnected. I paid full price for an alpha early access game really. 

When they sort out the bugs and the server issues and general instabilities of basically everything I think its a great game and a great concept but its extremely frustrating and in its current state I wouldn't suggest anyone pay this much for the game.

Ho aspettato due giorni e 20 ore di gioco quasi per scrivere questa ‘’recensione’’ anche se parlare di recensione per un gioco multiplayer che sto giocando in early access è fuori luogo per questo aggiornerò nel tempo il mio parere.

Partiamo dal primo impatto e dalle fondamenta. REMATCH è un gioco divertente? SI ed erano anni che non mi divertivo così con un mio amico a giocare. Dai tempi per l’appunto di Rocket League. REMATCH riprende un po' quella spensieratezza e quella formula arcade che gira attorno al giuoco del calcio per creare un gameplay stavolta non con le macchinine ma con calciatori ‘’reali’’ sviluppando un gioco facile da imparare ma difficile da padroneggiare come, a parer mio, dovrebbe sempre essere un gioco di questa tipologia. Dovrebbe divertire tutti ed essere accessibile a chiunque ma anche spettacolare e finemente complicato per chi nel tempo padroneggerà totalmente il gameplay.

Il gioco esalta e diverte fin da subito con una grafica semplice fluida ed un prodotto che gira anche su un tostapane MA il solito caro vecchio Unreal Engine si porta dietro da millenni ormai anche i soliti errori e crash sporadici fastidiosissimi (7 crash in 20 ore per me sono troppi).

Ad oggi il gioco presenta però dei GRAVI problemi di netcode e desync. Spesso quello che succederà a schermo non sarà quello che realmente voi avete visto. Contrasti a volte casuali, parate dove la palla entra in porta lo stesso e tanti piccoli bug a non finire.

Non va bene oggettivamente fare ancora da beta tester. Un early access si chiama EARLY ACCESS non BETA TESTING e questa cosa posso capire stia facendo incazzare la community.

Voglio però dare fiducia agli sviluppatori perché sinceramente penso che da qui a qualche settimana avremo per le mani un titolo dal potenziale di migliaia di ore di divertimento e telecronache alla Piccinini quando segnerete un gol CEZZIONALEEE PROPRO LUI!!!

Diamo fiducia e cerchiamo di perdonare un inizio non proprio roseo in early access
Domani uscirà il gioco per tutti e penso che sarà rilasciata subito una seconda patch (almeno spero) visto che ieri già ne è stata rilasciata una.

Non do un voto per il momento come spesso faccio ma mi limito a CONSIGLIARE REMATCH perché vedo un fortissimo potenziale.

Riusciranno gli sviluppatori a correre ai ripari e far diventare REMATCH il ‘’nuovo’’ fenomeno di massa stile Rocket League oppure la community si spazientirà presto ed assisteremo ad una morte prematura di un bellissimo progetto?

Per onestà intellettuale dico che il gioco mi è stato regalato da un mio amico che fa lo streamer ed ha ricevuto due chiavi gratuite ma non son stato pagato per recensire positivamente o robe simili. 

Anzi se nei prossimi mesi REMATCH fallirà tornerò qui a modificare la recensione e la renderò negativa

AGGIORNAMENTO 26/11/2025

Il gioco viene costantemente aggiornato dagli sviluppatori. A parer mio è migliorato tantissimo rispetto all´inizio. L´unico problema spesso è la community a determinati orari dove sembra invasa da ragazzini con scarso quoziente intellettivo e senza mani.

Après un peu plus de 10 h sur la béta et 5h sur le live après l'early release voilà mon avis sommaire avant de passer aux points positifs & négatifs un peu plus bas:
C'est un jeu pas mal attendu et pour une fois ça réponds plutôt aux attentes , le gameplay est intuitif , simple à prendre en main mais difficile à maitriser , avec déjà quelques "tech" inventées par la communauté comme le blade shot , le jeu ne viens néanmoins pas sans quelques défauts que l'on va énumérer plus loin 

Points positifs :
- Le gameplay et sa profondeur , et oui Jean-titouan mettant un avis négatif parceque la balle te passe au travers , il faut controler le ballon tu as une touche pour ça ..
- Les petits détails comme la musique qui se coupent lors d'un tir adverse
- La personnalisation .. nan personne n'en parle j'en parle , elle est vraiment cool  
- Le modèle économique respectueux selon moi , pour 25€ alors que ça achète des fifas recyclés à 80 balles tous les ans ... sign me up
- La jouissance absolue de rentrer un retourné acrobatique à 30 mètres des buts 
- Le jeu en équipe vraiment cool...

Points négatifs : 
-...Bah faut une équipe , c'est un jeu qui requiert de la coordination donc jouez y avec vos potes , avec des randoms presque personne à son micro ou même active le chat vocal et la plupart des gens veulent leur highlight Ronaldinho donc oubliez le tiki taka
- Les bugs serveurs encore présents , bien qu'ils soient infinimments moins présents que pendant les bétas , ça reste totalement jouable ça peut juste être chiant d'avoir l'impression de jouer avec 100 de ping quand tu en as 20
- Les divers bugs mineurs qui ne se pointent pas souvent mais quand  même , tel que l'adversaire qui commence la balle dans les pieds lors de votre engagement , rien d'absolument game breaker , mais ça reste chiant , surtout en ranked (Edit : apparemment ce bug vient d'être hotfix quelques heures après ma review)

Conclusion :
Devez vous l'acheter ? Et ben si vous l'avez pas précommander et n'êtes pas un fan absolu du genre ou devant rejoindre des potes dessus... non attendez , pourquoi je dis ça alors que j'adore le jeu ? C'est très simple , si sur les premiers jours de l'early release on constate des bugs serveurs ... attendez de voir l'état des serveurs quand tout le monde vas se lancer , les devs sont surement sur le coup mais loin de moi l'idée de vous recommander de dépenser 25 balles dans un jeu ou vous allez peut être pas pouvoir jouer de suite et vous dégouter avant que les patchs sortent.

🔥 Un BANGER avec un énorme potentiel... mais instable.

    Le jeu est vraiment excellent : gameplay nerveux, ambiance bien posée, fun immédiat. On sent qu’il y a une vraie vision derrière REMATCH.

    MAIS… faut être honnête : y’a pas mal de bugs, des crashs fréquents, des soucis dans les menus, et des détails qui cassent un peu l’immersion. Ça plombe un peu l’expérience, surtout quand t’es à fond dedans.

    🎯 Le potentiel est énorme, y’a moyen que ça devienne une vraie pépite.

    🛠️ Maintenant faut juste espérer que les devs assurent niveau mises à jour, parce que si dans un mois rien n’a bougé… ça risque de tomber dans l’oubli.

    ➕ Je recommande quand même, mais avec prudence. Si t’es prêt à supporter quelques couacs techniques, tu vas te régaler.

🕹️ Note perso : 9/10 avec les patchs, 6/10 en l’état.

Allow me to preface this by saying that I do not like football, at all. I am not a football fan but, and maybe this is showing my age a bit, I loved FIFA Street as a kid. FIFA Street took all the faff and slowdown away from the game and injected it with a sense of speed, style, and without the need to stop every 5 seconds to see if someone was "offside" whatever that means. I should say that this game is not particularly like FIFA street on a gameplay level but I bring it up because REMATCH does a very similar thing; it takes the concept of a football game and simplifies it to something much more pure. There are no stoppage times or fouls and there are walls to bounce shots off of, anything that takes away from a fast and fun game is removed in favour of the pure joy of some people running around trying to get a ball in a goal. And it's absolutely sensational!

When Sloclap first announced this game, as a fan of both Absolver and Sifu I initially was a bit confused as silly as that seems in retrospect, but they were the perfect people to make this game because the thing that ties all their games together are these intense senses of control, skill, and style. You feel so kinetically attached to your character and so in control of a situation that it's hard not to feel just outplayed when the ball is taken from you or a pass is intercepted, it's a game where you will become deeply aware of your own mistakes... And you're going to be sharing those mistakes with the other people on your team. Because if you didn't already know, REMATCH is not your typical isometric football game where you play as a lot of people; you play as one person in a 3rd person perspective and that's it, you are a small part of a collective, and as with any team game there will be moments where that is intensely rewarding, and others where that is deeply frustrating. Time will tell whether those moments of frustration will lead to a toxic community or not; at the moment things've been mostly okay for me but experiences will vary and it is early days, that said I do hope things can just stay nice and fun.

That said as addictive as the gameplay is it'd be criminal not to mention the style; Sloclap's fascination with the elements and big visual shifts are on full display here with the "AR arenas"; essentially changing the backgrounds and music to support whichever pitch the currently winning team's captain has chosen. Scoring a goal to suddenly find yourself in a jungle or underwater with new music to boot... it's great! It all looks and sounds awesome and just injects so much coolness and variety in a game that could've been very in danger of feeling visually and musically stale very quickly and fans of Absolver and SIfu are going to recognise some of these style instantly, and it rules to see that DNA be passed down from game to game; it's always been a great style, and it's great to see it still going strong.

So let's get to negatives; look it's a paid game that is still live service; that means season passes and microtransactions for cosmetics are here; I've yet to see anything egregious but the fact is that for many the existence of these things alone can be disqualifying and we do have to talk about it. Now if it does inject this game with a healthy and happy future of interesting content then cool, but it's going to take a while to see how that goes and the fact is the game I'm reviewing today will be different to the one you play tomorrow, so we'll have to see how that goes. At the moment there are also occasional small bugs, rare but very annoying crashes, and the occasional connection hiccup; I'd say things've been great 95% of the time for me personally and obviously that 5% can be ironed out over time but it is a game where a moment of lag that takes away that feeling of self ownership of a mistake can be more frustrating than anything because of how well the game feels outside of that. The game feels so good that when lag happens it feels ironically far worse than it would've if the game didn't feel so good and responsive to play xD

But these are minor gripes that can and will change over time, the fact of the matter is that I do not life football... and I adore REMATCH, it takes a game I fundamentally do not enjoy and turns it into one of the most fun, addicting, and emotionally investing multiplayer games I've ever played.

Un jeu avec beaucoup de potentiel, mais les bugs en tout genre prennent le dessus

First of all, DO NOT BUY THE GAME NOW. Wait until the problem I'll mention are fixed, but before that, don't give any penny to sloclap. 

I played both of the last two betas, and I was already worried when I noticed barely anything had changed between them. Now that the full release is out, I can sadly say things are worse than expected.

Main issues:

-Gameplay still feels unpolished. Ball control is inconsistent, and the ball sometimes detaches from your feet for no reason. This issue has been around since the first beta and is still here.

-Bug fixing feels random. Some minor bugs were fixed, but new, worse ones appeared. Crashes, freezes, connection errors — it feels like nothing was stress-tested properly.

 -Ranked matches are unstable. If a teammate crashes at the start, you still lose points. There’s no protection against that, which makes ranked a frustrating experience.

 -Server performance is poor. And this is before the real wave of players arrives (non-preorders, Game Pass users, etc.). If this is already the limit, the 19th is going to be a disaster.

The worst part? Many of these issues were reported during the betas. The whole point of testing is to improve things before launch, but it doesn’t feel like our feedback mattered. They didn’t listen — but they definitely took the money.

Unless things are fixed quickly and thoroughly, I don’t see this game surviving the summer.

Edit 1 : 1 month after the launch, minor bugfix, cheaters, only "we gonna" from the devs, let it die.
Edit 2 : still nothing 3 monthes after the launch, don't waste your money or time of this scam.
Edit 3 : they prefer adding skins and doing a free week end than fixing the game, don't buy any other game done by those clown.

i really dont care about sports at all, but i do like extreme sports games and sports video games that are easily picked up but deeply technical in the end. 

I do think this has the makings to be one of those. 

however it does have some growing pains that need ironed out and they need to do it rather quickly as todays gaming market moves at a pretty substantial clip. 

first off the look of the game is really solid and rather striking as you would expect out of a sloclap game, specifcally if you played sifu you know the studio has some pretty incredible artistic chops and no game especially sports game looks anything like this and that is a huge benefit to them. everything about it is very striking from the players to the arenas everything really looks great. i do however wish for a bit more legibility out of the ball and other players even in just 3v3 i find it can get pretty chaotic figuring out positioning of everything and everyone, sound helps but it could be tightened up a bit for sure. 

controls feel really good when the server is allowing everything to function properly, when its all working as intended man it feels great, in the same way sifu and absolver do, in the same way parries in sekiro do in the same way rocket league felt when it launched, it absolutely captures that....When the servers allow it. like for example i have the luxury of a roommate that also plays this and when doing a private match on separate machines  just one on one it works exactly as you would expect if they can get it to the complete experience man they have a killer on hand. however just like their other games there is a pretty substantial learning curve to everything, there is no straight pass, no immediate ball pick really the goalie has the most autonomy in movement and ball control everything else is pretty picky and some of that again feels like server dysnc or latency. 

to that end, goals sometimes dont count when they do, saves also don't in the same way, scoring team often gets the ball back when they shouldn't, occasionally the team with the ball will animate as if their passing the ball back to the goalie on kickoff and its just at an opposing players feet. when like 3-4 players start attacking or interacting with the ball at once it really struggles to understand what it wants to do or what is about to happen, and so it does become very difficult to actually account for what is happening what has happened and whats about to happen a lot of it becomes a gamble and at times it feels like it can just be animation priority like a fighting game but there is no actually tier list of what would take precedent over the other, not always but a fair bit of time it feels this way. there are just a large handful of tightening up mechanically that needs to happen and again as fast as possible as i could see people dropping off if its not addressed. 

as an example we were 2-3 and on the "final shot" we took the shot on an empty net, ball was fully in the air and we scored but still lost and did not get an opportunity for over time. what could have been a super super exciting battle for the next few minutes ended in just a full let down not only for that match but moral in general. these are the type of moments that have to be fixed for it to be taken seriously. were no Pros by any stretch but that loss of a moment is what defines competitive games.

monitization on the surface can look bad but the currency you get to buy like 95% of the items you get by just playing, like a hat is 600 or so points, ive played 10 hours i have close to like 11,000 shards or whatever the name actually is. even actual money spent its like 1-3 dollars for gloves or a shirt or whatever, its not crazy at the moment. 

Now the price of the actual game, i paid for early access as i really liked the beta but even with that $19 seems like the more appropriate price, i don't think $30 is unwarranted or egregious for the amount of play you will more than likely get out of the package going forward and obviously looking at the sales chart its doing very well for itself but i think $20 would really lighten the mood on a lot of the issues and give it a higher reach to an even larger audience. 

So far i do really like it and i hope it succeeds well into the future, but i will tell you get in earlier than later if you are even the least bit on the fence because people are going to get insanely good at this game and its going to get harder and harder to enjoy once they do they're are already some absolute monsters out there.

Всем хай,игра довольная классная и подобных таких игр я не играл. REMATCH при первым заходом в игру ты ничего не понимаешь, но после каток 5-10, у тебя уже есть понимание самой игры и катаешь без остановки. Я так в ЗБТ и сейчас играл довольно долго.Рекомендую...

Из минусов: Игра еще сыроватая, где-то мяч стоить на месте и его не сдвинуть, то при начале нового раунда в матче мяч появляется не у проигравших, а у рандома. Ты вратарь, ты пытаешься взять мяч, анимация показывает что ты его взял, а по факту тебе уже забили в ворота. С подкатами там отдельная история в неё влезать не хочу. Но это все минусы по самой механике игры.

Их плюсов, всё остальное что осталось: скины,редактор персонажа,весело провести время с бурными эмоциями и комментариями, разные эмоции празднования, разные стадионы, БП (довольный дешевый для нас) 

Короче говоря рекомендую покупать эту игру, в дальнейшем всё поправят, фризы, оптимизацию, механику и играть будем еще лучше :)

This game is incredibly fun! It’s fast-paced, tactical, and requires a solid understanding of football to climb the higher ranks. We played it in a group of five — some of us had good football knowledge, while others had little to no idea about things like positioning or movement off the ball. Guess which group performed worse?

That’s not to say you have no chance of progressing if you lack football knowledge. Like with any new game, you’ll need to learn and adapt if you want to reach the elite ranks. Understanding the fundamentals is a big part of improving, but the game also rewards effort and learning over time.

The price is also fair, especially when you consider that games like Rocket League also launched at around $20–25. The in-game shop only offers cosmetic items that don’t affect gameplay at all. These cosmetics are reasonably priced too, thanks to the dual currency system — one currency you earn by playing, and one that can be purchased. This ensures that the shop feels balanced and not pay-to-win.

Enjoying this game a ton.  It's got a couple rough edges that need to be smoothed out but the gameplay is very addictive.  It plays fairly similarly to Rocket League, but instead of the aerial play it focuses more on footwork with the ball, passing to teammates, using the camera and sticks to aim and curve shots, and applying unexpected trick shots.  The best thing is there is always 4v4 and 5v5 game modes, so we can get our whole gang together on one team.

This game is super unique and fun without a doubt. while I haven't played rocket league in a while, I have a around 2k-3k hours playing it, and I played soccer for a few years so this game had me very excited.           However, I have a few complaints. Firstly being that this game has many desync moments, it is every match. These desyncs while may not always affect gameplay can make the game feel like a roblox game. But the other issue I have is the controls, firstly the double tap shift to sprint has caused me to lose control of the ball many times when having to let go of sprint then reactivate a second later. Or many times where I quickly spam space to get the ball to move one way, then I go to get it again and the ball just gets kicked away again. This same thing will happen almost always where pre-imputs take place and can not be changed by other imputs. While I do see their idea with this, It is just extremely weird feeling and makes it difficult to properly play. While I'm not saying to remove this, I am saying that I'd love a setting to turn off pre-imputs and one to say how long between shift presses before it becomes using the super speed. just a few of those settings would allow me to at least change my way of playing to best suit me. I'm at 7.2 hours played at the time of writing this and I am still having trouble getting the controls down. While I do know they recommend controller, I just kinda have some buttons that have problems, and I don't like shooting feel on controller. I just neeeed some sort of settings to effect how the controls recieve imputs.

Probably the closest thing to shovel ware on Steam, Rematch is an underbaked mess riding on hype to succeed. There are 4 different queues, so playing solo means being stuck in 3v3 or maybe waiting 10 minutes for a 4v4. 5v5 is purely stacks so forget about even finding a match.

The controls are jank as hell. Getting possession is a fight against the weird system they have implemented for determining who has control of the ball, and spamming tackles negates ball carrying anyway. The game just becomes about who can serve alley oop shots off the rear wall the best.

Feels like ♥♥♥♥ to play, crashes often, and solo players are left in the most unbalanced game mode. Wouldn't recommend to anyone, it's barely even a football game.

UPDATE: It was mainly a skill issue.

UPDATE 2: So matchmaking means nothing. You will get equal Master/Elite tier players and Silver. Desync is somehow worse? Sadly this is just to FIFA what methadone is to heroin.

玩起來像格鬥游戲的足球游戲，也是除了任天堂那一系列體感之外最像運動的運動游戲。
沒有搓連招盤球，但有能讓你專注的單人操作、硬核的傳接判定、多樣的足球交互，不算難上手又有著極高的上限。

目前小問題還是有，例如不定時發作的伺服器或是閃退（我遇到的次數很少，不過可能只是個例）、偶爾判定會失常、缺乏實質的AI練習模式、娛樂模式等等。但目前的可玩性和觀賞性已經非常高了，下班回家路上都想著來一把。

REMATCH!

For those of us who played football/soccer games for many many years before they were taken over by the dreadful pay-to-win 'Ultimate Team' format that encourages children as young as 3 to gamble, this game is what we have been waiting for since forever.

Is it 1:1 football? Absolutely not. This is a video game that takes the essence of football and turns it into something fun, challenging and rewarding. Comparisons to Rocket League are natural, but if you're a Rocket League player with no interest in football/soccer then you may want to spend some time getting interested in the sport before you hop in, else you'll find yourself struggling a lot and (likely) being a huge liability to your team.

If you've read negative reviews and you're put off, I have two things to say; 1) You can't please all of the people all of the time. 2) Sloclap have been very good at sorting many of the issues thus far and are continuing to work hard on resolving them. People expecting rapid changes from the beta forget that it was only 2 weeks ago. This game is going to be active for years and will grow and evolve over time, which brings us back to point 1...

On that note, play it for yourself and make your own minds up. Personally, I love it!
rocket league 2

Pros:

- Fun, Accessible Gameplay: The core mechanics are easy to pick up, making it friendly for new players while still offering depth.

- Strong Performance (Pre-Patch): Game ran great on PC at launch, though the patch on June 17 introduced significant stutter issues.

- Cosmetics and Stats: Decent variety. but barely visible, even your Rank isn’t shown on the scoreboard during ranked matches, which feels like a missed opportunity.

- Skill Ceiling: The game rewards good passing, timing, and finishing. While not as technically demanding as Rocket League, teamwork is even more essential here.

Cons / Needs Improvement:

- QoL Features Lacking: Needs multiple mode/region queuing for faster matches, co-op training during queue times, etc.

- Long Queue Times: 5v5 and ranked queues often take 10–30 minutes to find a match.

- Server Issues: Persistent problems with desync, ball physics (e.g., wrong ball positions at round start), and lag.

- Client Issues: Sometimes you can’t control or interact with the ball due to bugs—it just passes through.

- Cosmetic Value: Some unlockables are barely shown, making them feel pointless. (e.g., stadiums, player cards)

- Battle Pass Progression: Feels slow for a paid game, especially since the season pass is a separate purchase.

Overall:
Rematch has a strong foundation and can be a blast, especially with friends. But to truly shine, it needs urgent QoL updates, matchmaking fixes, and more meaningful cosmetics/battle pass rewards.

#REMATCH: La consagración del fútbol táctico y la violencia rítmica de Sloclap
Imagina que los genios detrás de Sifu y Absolver deciden que el fútbol convencional es demasiado "amable" y deciden inyectarle la fisicidad cruda de sus sistemas de combate. El resultado es REMATCH, un título que en su Temporada 3 ha dejado de ser una curiosidad para convertirse en el estándar de los eSports de nueva generación. Aquí no hay algoritmos que decidan si un pase llega a su destino; hay un motor de colisiones implacable, una gestión de inercia que castiga el error y una ausencia de reglas que convierte cada partido en una coreografía de adrenalina pura. Es fútbol, sí, pero despojado de burocracia y encerrado en jaulas de realidad virtual donde solo sobrevive el más técnico.

⭐ REMATCH: SEASON 3 | ACCIÓN DEPORTIVA, FISICIDAD MECÁNICA Y COMPETICIÓN 5V5
DESARROLLADOR / EDITOR – Sloclap / Kepler Interactive
LANZAMIENTO – 19 de junio de 2025 (Season 3: 26 de marzo de 2026)
GÉNERO – Acción, Deportes, Multijugador Competitivo
PLATAFORMAS – PC (Steam), PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X/S

🧠 TRAMA | LA ESTÉTICA DE LA JAULA Y LA IDENTIDAD VIRTUAL
La narrativa de REMATCH se aleja de los guiones lineales para abrazar una construcción de mundo ambiental y urbana profundamente inmersiva que se siente coherente en cada rincón digital.
El Ecosistema de las Jaulas: El fútbol ha evolucionado hacia una disciplina de alto rendimiento practicada en infraestructuras digitales avanzadas. No hay estadios de césped infinitos; hay jaulas tecnológicas diseñadas para maximizar el flujo de juego. Esta premisa justifica la eliminación de fueras de juego o saques de banda, permitiendo que la pelota nunca deje de rodar y que la acción sea constante.
Cultura del Estilo y Personalización: El tono es vibrante y centrado en la autoexpresión. El juego presenta un mundo donde tu identidad visual es tan relevante como tu habilidad en el campo. Las colaboraciones de lujo con marcas como Balenciaga y la presencia de iconos como Ronaldinho o Mike Maignan validan esta nueva mitología deportiva donde el atleta es también un icono de estilo.
Narrativa Estacional: A través de sus "Capítulos", el juego desvela la red global de simulaciones que permiten jugar en biomas imposibles, desde zonas volcánicas hasta estaciones espaciales, sugiriendo que el deporte es el lenguaje universal de una humanidad volcada totalmente en la realidad virtual.

🎮 JUGABILIDAD | FISICIDAD Y APUNTADO MILIMÉTRICO (ANÁLISIS TOTAL)
El núcleo jugable de REMATCH es un ejercicio de precisión que exige una coordinación ojo-mano superior a cualquier simulador deportivo tradicional, eliminando las ayudas para premiar el talento puro.
La Filosofía del Control Manual: Olvídate del "auto-pase". Cada envío del balón requiere que dirijas manualmente una retícula hacia el espacio o el compañero. La potencia y el efecto dependen del tiempo que mantengas pulsado el gatillo, convirtiendo cada pase en un disparo de precisión donde el éxito es mérito exclusivo del jugador.
Gestión de Stamina e Inercia: El movimiento se rige por un sistema de peso y física satisfactorio. El sprint no es infinito; su uso consume una barra de energía que debe gestionarse con prudencia táctica. En la Temporada 3, Sloclap ha ajustado los costes de inicio de carrera para evitar el abuso de la velocidad constante, obligando a los jugadores a valorar la pausa y el posicionamiento inteligente.
Defensa Activa y el Portero Dinámico: La defensa requiere una lectura manual de la trayectoria del oponente. No hay robos automáticos; debes entrar en "Postura Defensiva" para interceptar con éxito. Además, el rol de portero es rotativo y heroico: cualquier jugador que entre primero en el área de meta gana habilidades acrobáticas únicas, fomentando una estrategia grupal flexible y emocionante.
El Fin del Vexis Dash: Uno de los cambios más celebrados de esta temporada es el ajuste del "Vexis Dash". Sloclap ha eliminado el magnetismo excesivo del balón durante esta maniobra, erradicando un exploit que permitía ataques imposibles de frenar y devolviendo el protagonismo a la técnica pura y el juego asociativo real.

🎨 APARTADO VISUAL | LA ESTÉTICA DE LA JAULA EN UE5
Gracias a las capacidades de Unreal Engine 5, REMATCH ofrece un despliegue técnico que prioriza la claridad sin renunciar al espectáculo visual de alta fidelidad.
Dirección Artística Neo-Arcade: El estilo es un 3D estilizado que utiliza materiales como la fibra de carbono y el vidrio reforzado para sus arenas. Los biomas exóticos cuentan con efectos de iluminación dinámica que reaccionan a cada impacto del balón, bañando el escenario con los colores de tus habilidades y creando una atmósfera competitiva única.
Animación Procedimental: La "fisicidad" de la que presume Sloclap se traduce en contactos entre jugadores que se sienten reales y contundentes. Las colisiones, caídas y forcejeos por la posesión utilizan tecnología avanzada para que cada impacto sea único, evitando las animaciones repetitivas y estáticas de otros simuladores del mercado.

🎵 SONIDO | EL PULSO INDUSTRIAL DE REMI GALLEGO
El apartado sonoro es el metrónomo que marca el ritmo frenético y adictivo de cada encuentro en la jaula.
Banda Sonora Reactiva: La música de Remi Gallego es una mezcla explosiva de ritmos industriales y electrónicos que evolucionan según la tensión del encuentro. El audio no es solo acompañamiento; es una herramienta que refuerza el "flow" competitivo y te mantiene en un estado de concentración absoluta.
Fisicidad Sonora: El diseño de sonido de los contactos es increíblemente robusto. Un tackle exitoso suena con un peso metálico que confirma la acción al jugador de forma satisfactoria, mientras que el sonido del balón varía según el material del cosmético equipado, manteniendo siempre una base de impacto digital potente y reconocible.

⏳ DURACIÓN Y REJUGABILIDAD | EL POZO COMPETITIVO
Como buen juego de servicio en vivo, la longevidad de REMATCH está diseñada para ser prácticamente infinita para el jugador que busca la gloria online.
Curva de Maestría: Los tutoriales y talleres de habilidades te llevarán unas 15 horas para obtener las medallas de oro, pero dominar el juego competitivo es una tarea de cientos de horas.
El Progreso del Captain Pass: El sistema de progresión estacional ofrece misiones diarias y semanales para desbloquear cosméticos exclusivos. Aunque el sistema es exigente, la Temporada 3 ha equilibrado los requisitos de tiempo, haciendo que los objetivos sean más alcanzables y gratificantes para todo tipo de perfiles.

💥 DIFICULTAD | EL CASTIGO DEL FRAME
REMATCH no es un juego indulgente ni pretende serlo. Su dificultad es de ejecución y táctica, sin ayudas automáticas que maquillen un error de cálculo.
Dificultad por Comunidad: Al ser puramente competitivo, la exigencia la marca el nivel de la base de usuarios mundial. El sistema de emparejamiento agrupa por rangos, pero la barrera de entrada mecánica sigue siendo un reto que recompensa la perseverancia.
Gestión de Errores: Un tackle mal calculado o un salto de portero a destiempo suelen terminar en gol. El juego castiga severamente el uso indiscriminado de los recursos, obligándote a aprender la geometría de los rebotes para poder competir en las ligas superiores con éxito.

🌟 VALORACIÓN FINAL | EL FUTURO DEL DEPORTE MECÁNICO
TRAMA | 8.5 (⭐⭐⭐⭐✩)
JUGABILIDAD | 9.5 (⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐)
GRÁFICOS | 9.0 (⭐⭐⭐⭐✩)
SONIDO | 9.0 (⭐⭐⭐⭐✩)
🎯 NOTA FINAL: 9 (⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐)

✅ RECOMENDADO Absolutamente. Es una compra obligada para los fans de los eSports exigentes, los entusiastas de la física técnica y cualquier jugador que busque una alternativa real a los simuladores convencionales cargados de asistencias.

I was really excited for this game but in its CURRENT state, this game isn't great. And here's why...

1. The controls feel a bit off even after given it a try for a couple of hours. It just needs some ironing out and some things need time to get used to. Like the difference in pass aim versus shot aim. An area that I feel needs ironing out is, I kind of wish there was an indicator that you have the ball in your possession. Made plenty of defensive tackles and tried to dribble for a counter attack only to basically run past the ball. There are also bugs/glitches with goalkeeping desync. You will save the ball on your screen but it will end up being scored. And it's apparent on the replay that the game scuffed. I also would appreciate the feature to review your match history, which is honestly surprising that it's not a feature.
These are minor things that can be improved upon but the MAJOR issues are related to the game's run performance and online features. These are things that can be improved upon and ironed out easily but should've been resolved after beta testing and BEFORE launch. I know this is technically "Early Access" but I have little faith these get resolved before the 19th.

2. I have a high-end rig and still experience some very bad frame drops in the middle of games and also latency stability failures. The most unenjoyable part is I have had multiple matches that freeze and crash the game midway. Also have joined a few matches in progress where I couldn't control my player or even open a menu to quit. Requiring me to force quit the application and relaunch.

3. Lastly, a missing key feature for an online game I would like to see at official launch is reporting players. I have had countless players on my team and the opposing team with fragile mentalities completely grief and score own goals to force the mercy rule. Not to mention players that get tilted at each other and have a crashout contest over comms... To not have a reporting system and a way to penalize these players will be a huge fallout for it's ranked scene.

The overall gameplay feels good, and I enjoy the mechanics and potential of this game. I'm vibing with the aesthetics and vision of the game. Again, this is my review for it's LAUNCH state that I believe should have been ironed out prior to its release. I understand the studio is a small team but I think most gamers nowadays are more acceptable to delays than 'incomplete' games.

I have faith in this game and the development team but as of right now I do not recommend this game. Writing this to be a source of first-hand information for people considering the purchase. Will update my review once improvements are released.

Esta reseña es de cuando llevaba ya unas horas jugando y demostraba lo inutiles que pueden llegar a ser los franceses con cualquier cosa, se demoraron meses en que las partidas fueran con lag jugable, por que todavia hay lag solamente que ahora es aguantable, entre 85 y 98 ms en el cono sur, el lag a veces se nota pero no tanto como antes.

Ahora 23/09/2025 Salio la Season 1, y dejenme decir que este juego tiene los peores y mas horribles cosmeticos que he visto en mi vida, son literalmente una estafa mas alla de las colaboraciones que hacen con jugadores todo, que aparte en las 70 horas que llevo he visto 6 ronaldinho 1 terstegen y 0 Kobbie Mainoo.

Las camisetas son horribles, en el pase te meten como 5 calcetines distintos y 4 rodilleras cuando absolutamente nadie las usa, te meten aros y barbas con flores, te venden el pase con estadios ya usados pero en version noche, son unos nefastos para crear contenido que parece hecho con IA especialmente sus descripciones, como le pones a terstatuen "Un calmado y lider portero aleman que para balones", lotes marinos que valen 10 DOLARES que son absolutas basuras "Suave, fluido y imposible de detener" hermano por dios, hasta los horribles de Cod te venden skins mil veces mejor hechas y con algo mas de imaginacion, el juego muerto de the finals tiene tremendas skins con diseños unicos, variados y que se ven que al menos le dedicaron unas 2 horas en hacerla y no 5 minutos como esta panda de estafadores.

que hablar de lo asquerosamente lento que ha sido todo, semanas esperando actualizaciones o una noticia, el juego salio con la mitad de las cosas jugables que deberia tener un juego de futbol, en mando por ejemplo no te deja colocar dos acciones en un mismo boton, esa es la mas infumable por que tienes que soltar la camara para poder mover el dedo y atajar con el TRIANGULO...

I'm on gigabit and the game is constantly rubber-banding and "undoing" actions made by teammates, enemies and yourself. I hope this is an issue with the launch but knowing one of the developers previous games "Absolver" had the same issues with netcode and was never addressed doesn't inspire confidence in me.

Fix the servers/latency and it should be good to go.

Minha review do Rematch🎮⚽
Jogo o Rematch desde o beta e posso dizer com confiança: é um dos jogos de futebol mais divertidos e diferenciados que já joguei. Desde o começo, o que me chamou a atenção foi o estilo arcade, rápido e cheio de personalidade, totalmente diferente dos simuladores de futebol mais tradicionais.

O jogo tem uma pegada casual e competitiva ao mesmo tempo, com partidas rápidas e muito foco na habilidade individual e no trabalho em equipe. O sistema de movimentação é fluido, o controle dos chutes e das jogadas é simples de aprender, mas difícil de dominar (o que dá vontade de sempre melhorar).

Além disso, eu tive a felicidade de ganhar o jogo como criador de conteúdo, o que me deixou ainda mais animado pra apoiar o projeto e jogar com a galera.

Desde o beta, dá pra ver como o time de desenvolvimento vem ouvindo a comunidade e melhorando o jogo a cada atualização. Os gráficos têm um estilo próprio, meio cartunesco mas com muita atenção aos detalhes.

Pra quem curte um jogo de futebol com mais ação, sem enrolação, e com uma comunidade que tá crescendo bastante, o Rematch é uma escolha excelente.

Recomendo muito, principalmente pra quem gosta de jogos online com aquela vibe de competição e diversão ao mesmo tempo. 👏⚽🔥

While it isn't a perfect experience, Rematch is one of the most fun competitive online games I've played in a few years. This is just a legitimately great set of systems to play with in an arcade package. I'm not a soccer (football) fan by any means. What I am a fan of is engaging and rewarding gameplay. The control over the ball that they give you feels incredibly intuitive and satisfying. I got a friend to play the beta of this game with me and both he and I clicked with the game despite having no interest in sports. I feel like that should say something considering it seems like football fans also seem to click with the game as well. Overall for the price, it is well worth the cost of admission. For those interested, there are microtransactions included but there doesn't seem to be any type of paid battlepass (So far) either which is a plus in my books. Instead you get a free set of seasonal rewards which add to your list of unlockable items as you progress through the track. Said track unlock in 3 phases, two of which are currently available to unlock. There is a paid currency as well as a free currency, both of which can be used to purchase all of the available seasonal items as well as the items available in the store save for a small handful of items that are paid currency only (2 currently). All customisation items in the store and unlock track from the seasonal rewards are purchasable through the generously offered free currency aside from a handful of custom character skins (And the above mentioned cosmetic items) of which I've seen 3 pro Footballers so far. I've already fully customised my character with the generous amounts of free currency and am constantly accruing extra for some additional field skins, different stadium backgrounds and other goodies. Those are a cool addition to the customisation in the game if you ask me and a very interesting potential DLC option in the future for tie ins and crossovers. Every stadium seems to have a day/night option as well just adding to the visual variety (Stadiums appear after goals to reveal the actual location you're in). 

Now, my only criticism of the game so far is that there have been a couple crashes and some odd rollback glitches in a handful of matches though thankfully they seem rare and I'm sure will be patched out fairly quickly**Updates have improved this part of the game fairly well so far. Much more stable than the first two weeks**. My guess is it has to do with the volume of players at times or potentially just a server load issue in general. All in all, this is a great arcade sports game in a landscape that very much needs more games like it. I can't wait to see what else they have cookin back at Sloclap!

*Every update appears to be addressing my biggest concerns first as well as acknowledging the next steps they plan to take going forward so IO couldn't be more happy as a fan*

Um jogo com a mecânica totalmente diferente. Aonde a dedicação para melhorar e ter pensamento rápido é essencial. This must be said, if you are truly a fan of the game of football, this game will fulfill every aspect of that fantasy of being in the big leagues in just a few minutes of playing. Every role in this game has a purpose and I love that the goalies in this game arent just placeholders to be scored on. 
There is a skill gap and so it will be a good competitive game, the tricks are simple but when thought out and pieced together well you can produce a cinematic masterpiece of the field.
Yes, there are some network issues but I've seen the devs take all these things into consideration and work on them slowly but surely. 
This game is insanely fun with a premade squad but I understand that may be hard to come by, the fill teammates are hit or miss so do with that as you will.
Overall...I love this game and I hope the best for it, I can see it going either way but as for now, it is still in prerelease and the devs are taking feedback well, I would recommend this game to anyone who loved a game of football with the homies after school. Peak.

O jogo e muito bom, tem potencial, mas para o que foi entregue, pelo menos nesse acesso antecipado e uma falta de respeito com quem adquiriu o jogo pelo modo elite e ate o jogo normalmente. Pelas betas serem betas, eu achava q muita coisa eles iam arrumar no lançamento, mas não só não arrumaram, como algumas coisas estavam melhores na beta no jogo, oque e impensável. Eu acreditava que por se tratar de um jogo "indie", eles tratariam o produto com maior esmero, mas não e oque eu vejo.

Travamentos, lag, crashs (Sim, o jogo esta crashando toda hora e as vezes estando na partida), bugs que nao foram resolvidos desde o beta passado e novos bugs, a loja do jogo ta uma merd# pra dizer o minimo. O passe e razoavel, no máximo, a customização continua limitada, em questão de cores, cabelos, rostos de personagem, ainda não tem escudo de time personalizável(O que eu considero um crime pra um jogo que se baseia em futebol(Equipe) e que já possui campeonatos realizados pela comunidade), não da nem pra colocar o nome do jogador na camisa! O conteúdo que foi adicionado não justifica o jogo ser pago, muito menos pelo valor que esta sendo cobrado. 

Isso que não estou citando os bugs visuais, a interface do jogo parece que não foi finalizada, mesmo jogando no ultra o jogo parece um jogo de PS4. Colocaram um prologo que não faz sentido nenhum existir, pensei que seria um modo de historia de personagem, mas não, e só um tutorial com cinemáticas que não dura nem 15min.

E o principal, os servidores estão terríveis. Pra um jogo competitivo online, e inadmissível todo esse lag que o jogo ta causando. E sabe o pior? Na primeira beta estava perfeito, na segunda começou a surgir ai jogo lança e nada e corrigido, e literalmente a Sloclap olhando pra vc e chamando o consumidor de otário.

- Tenía pensado comprarlo de salida y al final sucumbí a comprar la version que te deja jugar 3 días antes, grave error, vayamos por partes:

1. SERVIDORES [🔴] [EDIT 1: 🟡] 
- Los servidores van horrorosamente mal, cuando al servidor le da la gana pega un petardazo y ves la pelota bailando samba; la respuesta de los controles (paradas, regates, segadas) las registra 1 de cada 3 y por si no fuese poco, la conexión se cae al menos 1 o 2 veces por sesión en mitad de los partidos (sin hablar de los crasheos, luego hablo de eso)
🔄️ EDIT 1 -> El rendimiento de los servidores ha mejorado considerablemente, sigue habiendo errores, pero de manera puntual; el desync sigue siendo un problema real y deberia de ser solucionado cuanto antes 



2. MATCHMAKING [🔴] [EDIT 1: 🔴]
- El MMR de este juego es inexistente, hay gente en bronce que no debería de estar en ese rango porque o son muy buenos y hay gente en bronce porque no se puede estar más bajo; los puntos que te dan en rankeds por ganar son siempre los mismos, ignoran tu rendimiento durante el partido para darte unos miseros 20 puntos, ya seas MVP o tengas 300 puntos al final del partido; lo mismo si pierdes, siempre te quitan lo mismo según el rango en el que estes (Bronce te quitan 16, Plata 17, Oro 18, y así); además de esto si hay gente que se sale de tu partido, los puntos que te quitan son los mismos y no se toma en consideración
🔄️ EDIT 1 -> El MMR parece que ha sido intentado arreglar por las sombras en cierta medida, pero sigue siendo desastroso; la cantidad de puntos que te otorgan al ganar y que te quitan al perder sigue siendo la misma, no miran tu rendimiento durante las partidas para nada



3. RENDIMIENTO [🟡] [EDIT 1: 🟢]
- El rendimiento del juego es relativamente bueno para la cantidad de errores que tiene, cuando cambias de modo de control (Mando a Teclado o viceversa) el juego pega un petardazo; los crasheos son inminentes, cada 3 partidos el juego explota sin razón alguna, inclusive en medio de partidos te puede echar sin razón alguna y porque al juego le ha dado la gana, en FPS, el juego va bien, no increible, no mal, bien, a secas
🔄️ EDIT 1 -> El rendimiento del juego ha sido mejorado en gran medida, es un detalle que el juego no explote tan seguido cuando alguien marca un gol, aunque sigue pasando de vez en cuando, es algo que ha sido arreglado con el paso del tiempo, además los FPS han sido mejorados en gran medida



4. JUGABILIDAD [🟡] [EDIT 1: 🟢]
- La jugabilidad parece ser lo único pulido en este juego, el control se siente fluido y está bastante bien logrado; sin embargo, los servidores arruinan la experiencia, registra cosas que no son y tiende a ser más frustrante que satisfactorio; incluso con todo lo bueno en este punto, hay veces que el juego no sabe que hacer y simplemente el personaje se queda estático sin hacer absolutamente nada aunque le digas que chute o se tire a intentar salvar la pelota
🔄️ EDIT 1 -> La jugabilidad base sigue siendo lo mejor que tiene el juego, está realmente bien pulida pero debido a las desync y a veces a las raras respuestas del juego ante ciertas situaciones, se nota que aún faltan un par de cosas por pulir, esto ha ido mejorando debido a la mejor respuesta de los servidores, pero deben arreglar la de veces que no se registra bien una acción



5. MODOS DE JUEGO [🔴] [EDIT 1: 🔴]
- Al ser de pago debería de tener como mínimo un par de modos de juego variados para desconectar del modo principal y básico de este juego, cosa que este juego al parecer no conoce, los modos de juego son super limitados, nada más que 4 en total, 3 casuales que son los mencionados anteriormente y 1 ranked, no hay ni si quiera un modo individual, es lamentable
🔄️ EDIT 1 -> Sigue igual



6. CROSSPLAY [🔴] [EDIT 1: 🟡]
- Este punto no me afecta a mi, pero siendo que el punto del juego es jugar con amigos, que no exista el crossplay de salida tiene delito
🔄️ EDIT 1 -> Sigue sin crossplay pero al menos ya han anunciado que el juego lo tendrá



7. BUGS [🔴] [EDIT 1: 🟡]
- El juego está plagado de bugs, desde que el otro equipo empieza con la pelota cuando te han marcado hasta buscar partida clasificatoria con un jugador que no ha alcanzado el nivel necesario, no tiene sentido la cantidad de bugs que hay, no solo jugablemente si no también en los menús, sorprendentemente lo único que funciona bien es la parte de gastar dinero
🔄️ EDIT 1 -> La mayoria de bugs importantes ha sido arreglado y llevo varias partidas sin ver un bug que realmente me fastidie la experiencia base del juego, sin embargo el juego no está libre de ellos aún, de todas maneras va mejorando poco a poco



8. MICROPAGOS [🟡] [EDIT 1: 🟡]
- El juego si bien no está plagado de estos, los tiene, cosa que es una vergüenza teniendo en cuenta todo lo que queda aún por pulir el juego al completo
🔄️ EDIT 1 -> Este punto no lo tomaré en cuenta para la nota, pero es un poco de vergüenza meter micropagos cuando aún falta muchisimo para que el juego se pueda considerar como juego completo



🔄️ EDIT 1 -> 9. SISTEMAS BÁSICOS [EDIT 1: 🔴]
- No hay ningún sistema de reportes, ni replays, ni maneras de mutear a una persona en específico, es una vergüenza tener que mutear a todo mi equipo si hay una persona tocando la moral con el microfono activo; tampoco puedo reportar a estos jugadores que intencionadamente fastidian la experiencia dejandose ganar o saboteando las partidas, además, no hay replays para en caso de querer reportarlos, demostrarlo



🔄️ EDIT 1 -> 10. PRECIO [EDIT 1: 🔴]
- Viendo todo el percal, el precio del juego, para mi y para muchisima más gente, es demasiado caro, lo que ofrece el juego no es ni la mitad de lo que un juego free-to-play online puede ofrecer de salida, este juego no deberia de costar mas de 15€, 25 es demencial.



🔄️ EDIT 1 -> PUNTUACIÓN FINAL: 4/10

reviews.review:
Look, I’m not saying this soccer ball is magical, but ever since I bought it, my passes have been straighter, my shots have been harder, and my friends almost stopped laughing at my footwork.

This ball is round—like, perfectly round. Which, you’d think is a given, but you’d be surprised. It’s got this nice grippy texture that makes you feel like Messi... until you trip over it trying to do a step-over. 10/10 would embarrass myself again.

It holds air better than my uncle at Thanksgiving dinner—haven’t had to pump it once in two weeks. I’ve kicked it against walls, fences, a squirrel (not on purpose), and even my neighbor’s car (also not on purpose). Still looks brand new, though the neighbor is less forgiving.

In short, if you’re looking for a soccer ball that can survive your terrible aim, your dog’s teeth, and your cousin’s cannon leg, this one’s for you. Just remember: the ball’s not the problem. You are.

Esta reseña tenía pensada escribirla de cara a cuando saliera el juego para todas las ediciones (19 de junio) para ver como iría el juego sumando a los que se compran la edición estándar, pero visto lo visto procedo a escribirla antes de tiempo.

Para empezar con lo bueno de este juego; tiene un potencial increíble, es extremadamente entretenido y divertido, por ahora diría que es el rey en su competencia como juego de fútbol, teniendo un gameplay reinventado y bastante inmersivo con mecánicas muy sorprendentes.

Respecto a lo malo, su salida ha sido bastante mediocre, a pesar de haber pasado por 2 BETAS esta salida oficial no cambia mucho con respecto a su 1º beta (la beta 2 era infumable e increíblemente peor que la 1º, cosa que no lo entiendo, muy muy raro todo). Especificando, este juego de salida tiene:

-Bugs molestos a pesar de haber solventado ya previamente unos cuantos (imagínate si estuvieran también), ejemplos de estos son; la no cancelación del matchmaking cuando se le ha ordenado cancelar, balón pegado en el suelo cuando hay un choque múltiple y la más molesta y notoria: posesión del balón por parte del rival en el saque posterior a un gol de los mismo rivales, dando una ventaja increíble a ellos que van ganando (esto me pasó en ranked, una locura).

-Desync abundante, menos que en las betas pero debería ser mínimo puesto a que es un juego que depende de los reflejos y acciones inmediatas en tiempo real. Ejemplos de esto son, porteros que se ven que paran el balón (incluso teniéndolo en la mano) que resultan en gol sin tener el balón en el suelo, animaciones que salen antes que la del rival pero no se completan...

-Lag, seguido del desycn le sigue este punto que se resume simplemente en servidores no del todo preparados u optimizados habiendo tenido 2 betas para probar estrés.

-Logros bugeados, algo poco importante pero para los que les gusta coleccionarlos es molesto.

-Caídas individuales de servidores, por este punto es que escribo la reseña antes de que salga para todos, puesto a que se me han echado de los servidores 3 veces en una noche (con menos jugadores en línea) justo en partidos chulos, reñidos y en jugadas decisivas cuando justo el juego le da por ir bien una vez en toda la sesión.

-Crasheos inesperados, son muy muy poco abundantes pero existen y aparecen cuando más joden (que casualidad).

En conclusión, este juego es extremadamente divertido, tiene un potencial abrumador pero se ve eclipsado ciertamente por una salida oficial mediocre y mala lleno de bugs molestos, caídas de server espontáneas, crasheos, lag, desync, etc... Siendo la versión oficial y habiendo tenido 2 betas no es justificable el estado en que ha salido el juego, tampoco lo es que la desarrolladora sea pequeña (aunque lo sea, ha tenido muchísimo éxito con su anterior "Sifu"). Espero con bastante seguridad que esto va a cambiar radicalmente, no se en cuanto tiempo pero tengo la certeza de que la desarrolladora lo logrará, para ese entonces editaré esta reseña y recomendaré absolutamente este videojuego.

4 de julio, arreglaron la mayoría de bugs pero persiste el desync y siguen yendo fatal los servidores, llevan ya semana sin hotfix y se centran en meter mas cosmeticos antes que matarse en arreglar los servidores, un autentica vergüenza. Que no os engañen, el juego no ha salido entero todavía, sigue siendo una beta. Aún persisten pocos bugs pero los que hay se cargan el juego directamente. Normal que no haya crossplay de salida por la calidad pobre de los servidores (por lo menos los de Europa). Finalmente, le echo horas de mi tiempo por que basicamente no tiene una competencia clara (Rocket League tiene otra estilo realmente y le he echado ya las suficientes horas).

Unfortunately I have no hope for this game anymore, it was fun before, now it's just a constant abuse of broken mechanics and glitches to get results. Sad to see, I thought this would finally be the game that is purely just for the fun and love of the game. It is not.

There are some server and sync issues right now, but nothing that ruins the experience. My biggest gripe is the lack of controller remapping, which is a bit frustrating. That said, I’m still having a lot of fun despite these problems, and I’m confident the devs will address them soon.

Overall, REMATCH has a ton of potential and I’m excited to see where it goes.

Отличная игра с хорошими перспективами, больше всего радует отсутствие пей-ту-вин и высокий потенциал для роста скила. 
Из плюсов хочу выделить:
1. Приятную графику для онлайн игры и классные эффекты.
2. Отличный звук, обожаю когда музыка подстраивается под ситуацию на поле.
3. Разнообразный геймплей, который позволяет заниматься творчеством на футбольном поле, все зависит от тебя. 
Из минусов могу отметить:
1. Хаотичный матчмейкинг в ранкеде (на мой взгляд премейды не должны попадаться против рандомных команд). 
2. Временами нестабильное соединение, рассинхроны и не самой лучший пинг для РФ.
3. Управление вызывает вопросы, я попробовал и геймпад и клавамышь, мне больше по душе второе, но отдавать пасы "как будто мышь это стик геймпада" это крайне специфичное решение, которое даже после того как ты привык спустя сотни наигранных часов, все равно оставляет возможность случайно запульнуть мяч в обратную сторону.
4. Нужна система позиций, она как будто бы подразумевалась, но её нет и все бегают как попало.
5. Хотелось бы больше режимов, мечтаю о 8на8 и 11на11 в будущем.
6. Уродливые трансы-гермафродиты портят впечатление.

Oui, je recommande ce jeu car, malgré la présence de quelques bugs qui peuvent parfois survenir, il possède un énorme potentiel. Son concept de base est vraiment innovant et captivant, offrant déjà un plaisir de jeu solide et addictif, et on sent une vision ambitieuse des développeurs qui promet des améliorations futures passionnantes, laissant entrevoir un futur incontournable dans son genre.

En outre, j'espère vraiment voir de nouvelles mises à jour enrichir l'expérience dans les mois à venir. J'aimerais particulièrement que les développeurs ajoutent beaucoup plus d'options de personnalisation, avec des cosmétiques variés et des possibilités étendues de modifier les skins, afin de pouvoir créer de véritables personnages inspirés d'animes ou de dessins animés. L'ajout de nouvelles célébrations, surtout celles qui peuvent être faites à plusieurs joueurs, serait également un plus, tout comme l'intégration d'une manipulation pour réaliser des feintes, par exemple en faisant semblant de tirer pour enchaîner directement sur un dribble.

Primeramente el juego cuesta ni mas ni menos que 25 trompos ( a menos que lo obtengas de la plataforma verde *guiño guiño*), he tenido la mala idea de probarlo en su fase  de "early acces", "alpha" y "beta" y sin ninguna duda, ahora que el juego va a salir, está peor que nunca. Sin exagerar he jugado 6 horas en esta última fase de "early acces", pues al menos 10 de cada 10 partidas hay algún bug...habéis leído bien, en TODAS y cada una de las partidas, siempre hay un bug (esto ocurre a menos de 12 horas de la salida del juego oficial). A todo esto, CLARO que tiene pase de temporada, porque no puede faltar a estas alturas (digo esto mas que nada porque ya pagas por el juego, como para que encima tengas que hacer OTRA microtransacción del propio juego...Sin comentarios. El Juego es super bonito y dinámico, pero el precio que pagas, no lo vale. El competitivo puedo entender que no esté nada bien a estas alturas, pero que no tengas un modo distinto del 5 vs 5...Es caótico sinceramente. El menú es bastante intuitivo y sencillo, de eso no me quejo. Pero en cuanto a los controles es otra cosas... a estas alturas de desarrollo de videojuegos,  que no podamos jugar con controles personalizados deja mucho que desear, ya sea por comodidad, gusto o incluso por ACCESIBLIDAD. Sinceramente, deseaba con toda mi alma, desde la alpha, que este juego destronara al los grandes videojuegos de fútbol; que fuera la fusión perfecta entre dinamismo, diversión y fútbol...y solo lo ha cumplido en parte. En cuanto a los escenarios son preciosos , este juego tiene un arte muy chulo , es super bonito de ver y de jugar...pero lo demás le hace sombra .Si queréis probarlo y darle una oportunidad recomiendo que lo probéis cuando valga más barato, por la plataforma verde o que miréis un video extendido del juego. Siendo sincero y resumido...no vale la pena a menos que hagan cambios ya de ya.  5/10
